name: pop-pay — AI Agent Payment Runtime Security
description: The runtime security layer for AI agent commerce. Drop-in CLI + MCP server — blocks hallucinated purchases and keeps card credentials out of agent context. Card details are injected directly into the browser DOM via CDP; they never enter the agent's context window.

tools.name: request_virtual_card
tools.description: Issue a virtual card and inject credentials into the checkout page via CDP. Evaluates agent intent against spending policy and guardrail rules. Automatically scans the page for hidden prompt injections.

tools.name: request_purchaser_info
tools.description: Auto-fill billing/contact info (name, address, email, phone) into the active checkout page. Automatically scans the page for hidden prompt injections.

tools.name: request_x402_payment
tools.description: Pay for API calls via the x402 HTTP payment protocol, under the same budget and category guardrails as card payments.
